subject: re-schedule notice - western government affairs meeting

emails.subject: FW: RE-SCHEDULE NOTICE - Western Government Affairs Meeting
emails.subject_base: RE-SCHEDULE NOTICE - Western Government Affairs Meeting
emails.body: I take it you are no longer going to Portland? I need to cancel your tickets then. Would you let me know? Thanks, Joseph Forwarded by Joseph Alamo/NA/Enron on 07/31/2001 01:27 PM
